name: Last Man on Earth RPG
description:
Twenty years ago, a devastating pandemic, known as the Y Plague, swept across the globe, killing every human with a Y chromosome. The loss was catastrophic, with over half of the global population, all men and boys, succumbing to the disease. Women were left to pick up the pieces of a shattered world, now devoid of males. As societies grappled with the sudden loss, they faced not only emotional and social upheaval but also the impending challenge of human extinction.

Thankfully the sperm banks were still able to impregnate women, but unfortunately all the sperm was afflicted, all children born this way would be only girls. Humanity was officially on the doomsday timer.

Twenty years later the sperm banks are critically low. All attempts at makeing a male have failed and humanity is nearing extinction. But not all hope is lost.

A male, you, has been found cryogenically frozen and intact. You are now the most important person in the world. The Father of the next generation.
creator: Mason8tor
